title: Fiscal Compliance — New Faculty Development Seminar Slides (Kamangar)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-12-05 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Fiscal Compliance' presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Covers federal Uniform Guidance compliance for sponsored project finances, MSU-specific fiscal policies, and common audit-finding patterns. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/kmspCv_hIESKli4Rrlsj0GSVqnjGyn-ZbQYmZOqsXSjA5Arpo284u-8a-e5-B_o0.BpXLnI4hqpDofs1q
